data.content:
Implementation complete on branch `codex/363f-beat-overview-columns` at commit `9f4dc40701685f7426ddc82e06483dfa12c54e00`. Changed `src/components/beat-state-overview.tsx` from stacked state sections into dense per-state columns. Tiles are compact row buttons showing id/alias, title, priority, type, updated time, and parent/repo context when present. Interaction remains read-only/non-kanban: no drag/drop affordances; clicking still opens the existing detail lightbox.

Verification passed:
- `bun run lint`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bun run test` (247 files, 2661 passed, 11 skipped, 42 todo)
- `bun run build`
- In-app browser at `http://localhost:4137/beats?view=overview&state=queued`: overview visible with 163 tiles in all-repos context and no lease text.
- Playwright viewport checks: desktop 1440 body/document width 1410 <= viewport, mobile 390 body/document width 360 <= viewport; mobile uses contained overview rail scroll; lease text absent.
